evidence_scope: source-model authority gates for storage-intent acknowledgment ordering, membership, media, placement, trust, capacity, recovery, freshness, result, and refusal evidence
runtime_boundary: model evidence only; this does not validate mounted runtime behavior, QEMU crash or fault behavior, fsync or fdatasync barrier semantics, distributed transport execution, successor or comparator wording, production readiness, or release readiness

reviewed_authorities.role: policy, evidence query, media role, RAM authority, and receipt gate boundary
caller-visible result and refusal projection boundary
placement receipt and shared receipt reference boundary
blocked claim registry and evidence requirement authority

refuse_when: policy identity is missing
the earned class is lower than the requested class
receipt identity cannot be retained or recalled

must_name: committed root or durable intent refs
refuse_when: ordering is ambiguous
replay cannot reconstruct the promised cut
durable objective evidence is missing
quorum is absent
partition or split-brain state is ambiguous
fence evidence is stale or contradictory
the medium cannot legally satisfy the requested role
persistence or flush evidence is unavailable
RAM, cache, or volatile authority would be hidden as durable success
receipt refs are synthetic or unverifiable
placement generation is stale
replacement authority has not been published
the authority is outside the admitted trust domain
failure-domain evidence does not satisfy the policy
authorization evidence is unavailable
protected reserves would be spent by optional movement
receipt retirement cannot preserve old authority
admission would hide reserve exhaustion
recovery cannot honor the promised receipt
RPO or RTO evidence is outside the requested objective
degraded service is not caller-visible
evidence is stale
the freshness frontier is unknown
the consumer's proof need exceeds retained evidence
the surface cannot project the earned receipt
the answer would compress a typed refusal into generic success
retention proof is missing

must_refuse_when: any required durable objective evidence family is missing
the requested receipt cannot be retained and recalled

must_refuse_stronger_receipts_until: partition state is resolved or projected as degraded-visible

legal_only_when: caller projection is weaker than durable success
durable requests receive refusal or degraded-visible result
illegal_when: RAM, cache, or volatile authority silently satisfies a durable receipt
caller-visible result omits the weaker earned class

non_claims: This artifact does not validate mounted runtime receipt production.
This artifact does not validate QEMU crash or fault behavior.
This artifact does not validate POSIX fsync, fdatasync, FUA, or barrier semantics.
This artifact does not validate successor, comparator, production, or release-readiness wording.
